name: 20/20 Biolabs, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview We develop and commercialize AI-powered, laboratory-based blood tests for the early detection and prevention of cancers and chronic diseases. We offer two families of lab tests, both under our OneTest brand: (i) OneTest for Cancer, a multi-cancer early detection, or MCED, and (ii) OneTest for Longevity, which measures inflammatory biomarkers, that was launched in February 2026 (the Longevity test is also being branded OneTest for Workplace Wellness when marketed to self-insured...
